creator: ohartman2zedat.fu-berlin.de@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since migration from PostgreSQL 8.3.XX to PostgreSQL 8.4 on FreeBSD 8.0-BETA2/amd64 the upgraded servers crash after a while, the time depends on load on the database engine and RAM equippted to the server

Fix: 

Downgrade to PostgreSQL 8.3 and take the inconvenience down-migrating the tables
How-To-Repeat: Install PostgreSQL 8.4 on FreeBSD 8.0-BETA2/amd64 (most recent) and do heavy I/O on the DB.
